title: The Four Holy Cities of Israel: Jerusalem, Hebron, Safed, and Tiberias
title_zh: 以色列四大圣城:耶路撒冷、希伯伦、采法特与太巴列
title_he: ארבע ערי הקודש בישראל: ירושלים, חברון, צפת וטבריה
description: An exploration of the four holy cities in Jewish tradition—Jerusalem, Hebron, Safed, and Tiberias—examining their historical significance, spiritual importance, and unique contributions to Jewish thought and practice.
cultural_parallels: Chinese sacred mountains (Mount Tai, Mount Emei, Mount Wutai)
扫墓 (sǎo mù) - visiting ancestral graves
Buddhist monastery cities for meditation and spiritual practice
Four cardinal directions in Chinese cosmology
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge, converts, and those exploring Orthodox Judaism
author: Torah Light Project
